title: tragia nepetifolia var. latifolia
intro: Tragia nepetifolia var. latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved bitter spurge, is a plant species within the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of T. nepetifolia var. latifolia are attributed to its latex and leaves, which contain bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. T. nepetifolia var. latifolia is traditionally prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
